---
title: 'STOP SOPA AND PIPA SAVE Christian Websites'
date: '2012-01-18T18:01:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '70358253063123480'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/stop-sopa-and-pipa-save-christian.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Random'
  - 'URGENT'
---

STOP SOPA AND PIPA... This is an act that the devil will try to use to take Free Speech and Christians Rights away. They will begin to say that anything not spoken in tollerance of sin is hate speech and shut down Christian websites. This is an EVIL EVIL EVIL plan STOP IT! See this link below for more information on PIPA and SOPA<br /><br /><a href="http://wordpress.org/news/2012/01/help-stop-sopa-pipa/">http://wordpress.org/news/2012/01/help-stop-sopa-pipa/</a><br /><br />
